title: tectaria angustior
intro: Tectaria angustior, also known as the Chinese fan fern or fan-shaped fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. Tectaria angustior has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Tectaria angustior include treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne, due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. Tectaria angustior can be prepared as a tea or powder, or used in combination with other herbs, to promote overall health and well-being.
